tier_role: Extreme stress cohort selected from unused highly difficult and high-risk cases; higher failure-rate sample than the intrinsic uber-messy cohort.
selection_method: Selected from unused 2,000-case dataset records after the existing six cohorts were frozen.
Prioritized high intrinsic difficulty plus current parser/readiness failure categories to create a higher-error stress cohort.
This cohort is non-overlapping with the other generated cohorts, but it is intentionally more failure-dense than a neutral distribution.
overlap_policy: No overlap with other generated cohorts in this selection run.
